features: [Plug-and-play & function button] Plug-and-play No need to install a dedicated driver, just plug the USB receiver into your computer and enjoy this vertical mouse right away. Equipped with function buttons, convenient "forward / back" buttons for web browsing and spreadsheet software are standard equipment.

[Ergonomic and anti-fatigue design] Ergonomic, anti-fatigue vertical design is suitable for all hand types. vertical angle helps to reduce wrist muscles strain, keep your wrist in a natural state ,encourages healthy neutral "handshake" wrist and arm positions for smoother movement and reduce muscle tension, prevent repetitive stress and injury, and not feel tired after prolonged use.

[Built-in rechargeable battery & energy saving] Built-in rechargeable battery, no longer need to buy batteries. With breathing LED light, if you do not operate for 3 seconds, it will enter power saving mode, if you do not operate for 8 minutes, the mouse will enter smart sleep mode. Press any button to restart. Power saving design extends battery life. Takes 3-4 hours to fully charge, which can be used for about 7-8 weeks.

[DPI can be adjusted in three steps & long life button] Equipped with a high-performance optical engine, switch the cursor speed to 800, 1200, 1600 DPI according to the case, freely change the mouse speed, The optical tracking technology provides smoother and preciser tracking than a regular optical mice. Meets the request for regular work, study, design work etc.Button long life design can be about 5 million times.

[2.4GHz wireless connection] With a USB receiver, safe and advanced 2.4GHz wireless transmission technology and optical tracking technology, no driver required, just connect to USB port of laptop or computer, effective transmission distance of 10 meters. Warranty period: We provide a one-year warranty period from the date of purchase, and if there is a failure during the warranty period, please contact us from Amazon purchase history and we will respond immediately.

reviews.title: GREAT BUY!
reviews.text:
I had purchased an ergonomic mouse prior to this one. It was rechargeable as well and died less than an hour after lite use. It was not very comfortable and felt cheap. When i received this one I was skeptical because it did feel lite weight and I worried it would be cheap quality. It is comfortable & light weight, rechargeable long lasting charge. I use it for work it lasts all day and since I work from home I used it at night as well without needing a recharge until bed time. I have switched to regular mouse a couple times when i forgot to charge mine and there is a huge difference in comfort. I have a hand injury and when i use a regular mouse my hand hurts, after using this one I see a big difference when I have had to switch back. Highly recommend.

** update: i’ve now had this for several months and I have actually ordered another one which I haven’t had to take out of the box. I honestly ordered it because I lost the charging cord to my first one which I rarely use. I think I charge this mouse maybe once a week if that and I use it up to 15 hours a day with work and it never dies.

reviews.title: Love this mouse!
reviews.text: This is the 3rd one so I can have 2 at work in case I forget to charge it I have a backup and 1 at home.  The buttons aren't as quiet on this one and it's not that pretty shiny purple as pictured but if you're an Admin Asst like me you will love it! It took away my shoulder and wrist pain.

reviews.title: Great for carpal tunnel!
reviews.text: I bought this mouse for its ergonomically design. It is great for my carpal tunnel. Sleep mode is fantastic and it’s easy to charge, which it does quickly.

reviews.title: so cute
reviews.text: my granddaughter loved it

reviews.title: Great Battery Life, Comfortable hold for a slim-line mouse, Llama is AWESOME!
reviews.text: I'm not crazy about the aerodynamic mice, but I bought one because of the Llama.  It is VERY slim, but more comfortable than I imagined it would be to hold.  The Llama image is on the mouse solidly, it won't come off, which is ideal.  The mouse was easy to install, took my computer maximum of 1 minute to install the driver and my computer is 7 years old.  The other great thing is it has a 'battery saving' feature that puts the mouse into sleep mode when not in use.  To use it again simply left-click once and your mouse is awake and functioning again.  I use this mouse all day for work and at night for pleasure, haven't replaced the batteries yet!

title: Neises Ergonomic Mouse, Bluetooth Mouse for ipad,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Air/Mac/MacBook Pro/Mini/ipad Pro/iMac/Laptop,Rechargeable Wireless Mouse for MacBook Air/MacBook pro Chromebook Laptop PC
description:
Tip:Scientific ergonomic design maintains healthy wrist and arm positions to achieve smoother movement and reduce overall stress.
How to use it:
A. 2.4Ghz Mode:
Switch to "ON/OFF" button to right.And Plug the receiver into the USB port or use a USB C adapter to plug into the type c port of your computer, Then you can use the mouse in 2.4GHz Mode.
B. Bluetooth Mode:
Switch on Bluetooth on your device and power on the mouse. Press the DPI Button or Press Left,Roller and Right 3 Buttons together for 5 seconds.When the mouse name coming up on the device.Click it and it will be connected.
Note:
System Requirement: Windows 8/10, Android 4.2 and above,Mac & IOS 10.10(Compatiable with 4.2BLE、4.1BLE、4.0BLE or earlier)
Package Included:
1* Dual Mode Mouse
1* Charging Cable
1*USB Receiver (under earth the mouse)
1*Type C Adapter
Note:
1. It's out of power if the mouse cursor moves slowly or stop moving. Please recharge it. Note: Please do not charge the mouse with mobile phone charger.
2. Please charge the mouse for 2 hours before the first time to use it. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.
3. Not all computers support two modes. For example, Win 7 system does not support Bluetooth mode.
4. There is memory function on Bluetooth Type Mouse.When the mouse has connected another device,and now you would like connect the device not connected with the mouse last time, it should re-connect with the device.
5. If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.
features: 【2022 Latest Upgrade Optical Ergonomic Design】Reduce the overall pressure on the hand, specially designed for long-term use of the mouse, providing a more comfortable way to use.

reviews.title: Liked it but doesn’t last long
reviews.text: The reviews seemed to be a mix so I figured I’d give the mouse a shot with my MacBook. Worked great until one week after the return window closed and now it’s worthless junk. I would skip this.

reviews.title: Wheel Started Squeaking Less than 2 Weeks into Usage
reviews.text: I love the design of this mouse but the scrolling wheel started squeaking when used less than 14 days into using this mouse and it's, quite honestly, a bit maddening.  I can't figure out WHY it's squeaking and I've tried using compressed air to maybe clean something that might have gotten into the mouse to no avail.  It still squeaks.  All. The. Time.

reviews.title: Works perfectly with my iPad
reviews.text:
I bought this so I could mirror my iPad to my 27" iMac and play some gorgeous games on a big screen. The mouse lets me use the iPad as an, um, mousepad...works beautifully. The instructions were easy to follow and the box contains a wireless receiver if you don't want to use bluetooth. Also in the box is a USB adapter if you need to plug the receiver into a USB-C port.

And finally, the color-changing light bar is kinda sexy. A bargain at the price.

reviews.title: Great mouse
reviews.text: Love this mouse. Attached it to an iPad keyboard so now able to use it along w/ iPencil & touch screen. Very easy to use, fits in my hand comfortably & the light that emanates from it is a nice touch.

reviews.title: you get what you pay for
reviews.text: these work but feel like crap.  Left and right click are terrible.  Sometimes when I left click, as the piece of plastic is coming back up, it goes under the right side.  Its like someone took a solid sheet of plastic and cut a line down the middle to allow you to press down on the left or right side, its terrible.  Scroll wheel feels fine.  DPI button just cycles through, no way to go up or down, just cycles through 3 modes.  Very uncomfortable.  For the price, you get two and both are exactly like this so I doubt its defective.  I only got these to control my streaming PC so its not a HUGE deal, but if youre getting these for daily use - DONT DO IT.  I can hardly put up with these and I use them for maybe 10 mins a day.  Pay 15$ for one mouse.  I honestly feel like I could crush these with my hand - thats how crappy they feel.  They also go to sleep mode after like 5 mins so I have to constantly click it to wake it up, and it ends up opening apps.  Not worth the 15$

title: Neises LED Bluetooth Mouse,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Pro/MacBook Air/iMac/mac/ipad/ipad pro,Wireless Mouse for Macboook Air/MacBook Pro/PC (Silver)
description:
✅Packing list: Instructions*1, LED rechargeable Bluetooth5.1 + 2.4G dual-mode mouse *1, 2.4g Nano USB receiver *1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line *1, USB C-type adapter *1
✅How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:
Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse.
✅ How to connect to iOS/iPad/Pro/Air/ Mini/ Phone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse
first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.)
(1) open tabletSettings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）
(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)
🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse?
🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
✅ How to use the 2.4G receiver mode:
Open the 2.4G receiver mode at the bottom of the mouse, remove the USB receiver at the bottom of the mouse,Plug the USB receiver into your computer's USB port and move the mouse to start working，If your laptop is a Type C port, first plug the Type C adapter into your laptop's Type C port, then plug the mouse's USB receiver into the Type C adapter, and then move the mouse to work
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
features: ERGONOMIC DESIGN： Good surface coating technology given you a skin-like touch feeling. User-friendly design provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and pocket-sized perfect for travel, Mute design keeps away annoying clicks.

Use the DPI mouse button on the screen: you are free to adjust the mouse sensitivity to match your activity. Provide 3 DPI levels (800-1200-1600). The higher the DPI, the faster the cursor moves on the screen
For all computers and laptops and ios13 / ios14 tablet/pro/Air / Phone / MAC / MacBook / Pro / air windows / chromebook / HP / Dell
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
BUILT-IN BATTERY: Built-in battery,easy to charge by micro usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.

reviews.title: Works well, when it connects.  Update:  It loses connection WAY too much
reviews.text:
I like the mouse. Excellent value for money, except for one very annoying flaw. It is constantly disconnecting the bluetooth connection from my new Macbook Pro. It's pretty annoying.

After what feels like only a few minutes of idle time, the mouse bluetoothe disconnects. Then when I move it nothing happens for a couple seconds. The finally, it connects and my laptop tells me the mouse is back, and it works perfectly... until the next time it is idle.

I have use other low cost brands as well as my Apple Magic Mouse (which I don't use as I prefer a track wheel). I have not had any issues with the Bluetooth on those, only this one...

If it were not for the disconnect issue I would rate the mouse a 5 star. Otherwise, I give it a 3. I am still using it for now, but will find a better one...

UPDATE: Okay, I find that I am CONSTANTLY drustrated that this mouse loses connection with my laptop. PITA. Not worth using at any price.

reviews.title: Junk
reviews.text: Even after swapping out the battery, and making sure it’s in pairing mode, it refuses to pair with any device I’ve tried and doesn’t show up in my Bluetooth menu as a visible device. It very briefly showed up on my Macbook as a keyboard, but never as a mouse, and now it won’t even do that. Save your money and get a mouse that will work.

reviews.title: Sharp, poor cursor control, poor scrolling

Scrolling is pretty much a bumpy ride, all or nothing, no matter how you set the scroll.  The cursor was very hard to control and very hard to get it in the right place.  Yes, I played with mouse settings and tried to tweak but no go.

Plug the nano transceiver into your computer's USB port for a reliable wireless connection without any hassle of additional wire and driver. Wireless connectivity for reliable usage Advanced optical mouse with responsive tracking Noiseless click, soft touch  High dpi movement resolution works on most surfaces. Wireless mouse reduces workspace clutter 3-button mouse for better functionality and fast scrolling capability
Specification:
Dimensions: 1.4 x 2.6 x 4.7 inches (H x W x D)  Battery: 1 x AA battery (not included) Handedness: Ambidextrous Interface(s): USB 2.0 Wireless: Yes Warranty: 1 year Brand Compatibility: Universal Model Compatibility: PC, Laptop, Windows devices System Requirements: Windows XP, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows 8, Windows 10, Windows 2000, Mac OS X 10.4 or later Number of Buttons: 3 Mouse Operation: Button(s) with scroll wheel Plug and Play Operation: Yes

reviews.title: ** Use tips ** Nice mouse....
reviews.text:
Nice mouse.... slightly large, and I have large hands. If you have small hands, I would purchase a size down.

It is simple to set up, works well (so far), and I like the wireless feature.

Tips:

My other mouse had a place to store the USB unit. This one also has a storage slot, which makes it convenient. Otherwise, you can leave the USB connector in the laptop (If it fits in your case with the device inserted...)

Be sure to turn off the device when not in use to conserve your batteries. (Sliding switch on bottom)

This mouse is Windows compatible. I run Windows 7.... works fine.

If you have a trackpad that drives you crazy, these devices are great!

Enjoy!

title: LED Bluetooth Mouse for Laptop iPad MacBook pro Wireless Mouse for Laptop MacBook Air Mac Chromebook
description: Packing list: Instructions x1, LED charging Bluetooth + 2.4G dual-mode wireless mouse x1, 2.4g Nano USB wireless receiver x1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line x1, USB C-type adapter x1, packing box x1, How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:  Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse. How to connect to iPad Pro/iPad Air/ Mini/ iPhone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse  first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.) (1) open ipad Settings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)  🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse? 🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
features: 🖱💻🖥📱BEST COMPATIBLE BLUETOOTH 5.1 CHIP: Compatible with more than 99.8% Bluetooth devices. This bluetooth mouse is suitable for all laptops with bluetooth function or ipad iPhone with iOS13 or above
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
✅BUILT-IN BATTERY: Built-in battery,easy to charge by micro usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.please please keep the mouse power switch in "ON" position when charging .

✅ERGONOMIC DESIGN： Good surface coating technology given you a skin-like touch feeling. User-friendly design provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and pocket-sized perfect for travel, Mute design keeps away annoying clicks.

✅AUTO ENERGY-SAVINGSLEEPING MODE: Li-polymer batteries,high cycle life.the Auto Switch Off function will help you save energy as your bluetooth mouse will switch off when your PC is turned off or the receiver is disconnected. If you do not use the mouse for eight minutes, it will go to sleeping mode, you can press the any button to weak it up.

reviews.title: Bad product
reviews.text: It worked for a bit and then it just wouldn’t move ni matter if I charged it. Not happy

reviews.title: Lightweight and smooth.
reviews.text: Clicks easily and slides on mouse pad smoothly. A bit frustrating that it goes into sleep mode after a short time when I’m busy elsewhere but ease of use makes it okay. You need to be careful putting in the charger since the mouse is lightweight. And I love the pink color!

reviews.title: I like it
reviews.text: I like most of things to be wireless, and I really like this mouse because I have yet to have an issue with the bluetooth connection. I will say that you do have to push a bit harder to click the mouse than I am normally used to, but it's negligible and ultimately didn't bother me. I like the lights on it, and the side of the mouse works great for me (although it's a bit small for someone with big hands). I would buy again.

reviews.title: Goes to sleep when you need it the most
reviews.text: Won't stay connected to my laptop and goes to sleep.  Have to power cycle to get it to work again.  Even tried leaving the USB cable plugged in and it still goes to sleep.

reviews.title: Looks expensive but feels cheap
reviews.text:
The included USB charging line does not fit snug. Feels like an aftermarket adapter and felt as if the mouse would break is pushed all the way in or pulled out. Time will tell if the charging line lasts. I'll update as time goes on.

It has the feel of a toy but the girls in the house are already asking for one like it, so pretty sells. Color is towards the green scale but works well with seafoam colors.

title: Logitech M317c (Collection) Wireless Optical Mouse-color: Wireless Mouse Skate Burger
description: Logitech M317C Doodle Collection Wireless Mouse Navigation for your imagination A Doodle Collection Wireless Mouse takes you far away from the everyday. All the way to your happy place. Choose from doodle designs that reflect your creativity. From floating robot heads to skateboarding cheeseburgers, there’s a Doodle Mouse for each and every doodler. Lasts up to 18 months on a single battery. Responds up to 33 ft. (10m) with a nano wireless receiver. Rips through web pages and docs with precision scrolling. Daydream on for up to 18 months Your imagination is always on, just like your Doodle Mouse. Scroll all the way to your happy place on a single, pre-installed battery. Get your doodle on for up to 18 months.
features: EVERY DOODLE’S DIFFERENT Choose a unique design to express your creativity. From floating robot heads to skateboarding cheeseburgers, there’s a Doodle Collection Mouse for each and every doodler

Doodle away Doodle Mice are small, portable, and super responsive with a secure link between mouse and receiver from up to 33 feet (10m) away.* *Actual wireless range may vary with use, settings, and environmental conditions.
JOIN THE DOODLE Taking yourself seriously is no fun. So lighten up, express your creativity, and embrace the doodle lifestyle. You’re just a scroll away from your happy place.
System Requirements Windows 10 or later, Windows 8, Windows RT, Windows 7 Mac OS X 10.5 or later Chrome OS Linux Kernel 2.6+2 USB connection: available USB port required.

reviews.title: Fit my hand nicely
reviews.text: Love these mini Logitech mouse with all of our laptops. The designs are whimsical and the mouse works well with the laptops. (We have 4) Recommended!

reviews.title: Computer mouse
reviews.text: This is my second Logitech mouse. It’s cute, works well and is easy to install. I added this second one just to have a spare. No problems encountered.

title: BTS Inspired Characters Multi Pairing Wireless Mouse, Little Buddy Baby Better Together Edition, All in Their Own Cute Style & Colors (KOYA)
description: CUTE WIRELESS MOUSE: These seven cute BTS Inspired animated character wireless silent mouses are a style of art that frames cute child-like characters. All characters were designed by their respective members. SHOW YOUR LOVE AND SUPPORT: Show your love for BTS with the official wireless silent mouse representing all seven members of BTS! You can acquire all one or all 7 BTS inspired characters that you can show your friends, family, & other ARMY fans. Share if you want! DESK BUDDIES: Have your BTS inspired character with you while you work, study, or play! Just plug in your wireless receiver and it's ready to use! Show your support for BTS or your favorite member! PERFECT MATCH: This wireless silent mouse goes well with all the other BTS Tiny Tan Computer Accessories like Keyboard, Monitor Figurines, and more! WHAT’S INCLUDED: Wireless smart mouse, AA battery, manual and nano receiver

reviews.title: Cute, compact and quiet
reviews.text: I bought this for my step daughter. She loves it and has used it daily.
